title: COMMUNICATION METHOD, COMMUNICATION PROGRAM, AND AUTOMATIC TELLER MACHINE
summary: A communication method includes performing authentication through data communication encrypted by a first encryption scheme by a first processor installed outside a storage box in an automatic teller machine and a second processor installed in the storage box, and transmitting an instruction to the second processor through data communication encrypted by a second encryption scheme, in a case where the authentication has been performed normally by the first processor.
details:
IN THE CLAIMS:
Please AMEND the claims in accordance with the following:

performing authentication through data communication encrypted by a first encryption scheme by a first processor installed outside a storage box in an automatic teller machine and a second processor installed in the storage box;_
[[and]] transmitting an instruction to the second processor through data communication encrypted by a second encryption scheme, in a case where the authentication has been performed normally as a normal communication by the first processor;

Canceled

3
3. (Currently Amended) The communication method according to claim[[ 2]]_1,

wherein the performing the authentication includes deleting the identification information stored in the storage, in a case where the authentication has not been performed normally by the second processor.
Currently amended

4
4. (Currently Amended) The communication method according to claim[[ 2]]_1,

wherein the storing includes storing the identification information notified, into the storage, in a case where the second processor detects operation in the storage box when the first processor notifies the second processor of the identification information.
Currently amended

5. (currently amended) A non-transitory computer-readable recording medium storing therein a communication program that causes a computer to execute a process comprising:
performing authentication through data communication encrypted by a first encryption scheme by a first processor installed outside a storage box in an automatic teller machine and a second processor installed in the storage box; and
transmitting an instruction to the second processor through data communication encrypted by a second encryption scheme, in a case where the authentication has been performed normally as a normal communication by the first processor;
